summary: Acts as the sole, transactional, and secure gateway to the file system.

listensFor.summary: Requests to change the currently viewed directory path.
Triggers the native OS file chooser to select a directory.

Requests that the FileSystemFeature orchestrate a user-mediated, one-time read of a directory outside the originator's sandbox. This feature will show a security warning, then the OS file picker, and deliver the results via a private channel.

fileExtensions.description: Optional list of extensions to filter by (e.g., ["json", "md"])

listensFor.summary: [INTERNAL] Triggers a side-effect to load a directory's children from disk.
[PRIVATE-CHANNEL] Requests a listing of files/directories in the originator's private sandbox. The response is delivered via private channel.

subpath.description: An optional sub-directory within the sandbox to list.

listensFor.summary: [PRIVATE-CHANNEL] Requests a recursive listing of all files within a given subpath of the originator's sandbox. The response is delivered via the private channel.
[PRIVATE-CHANNEL] Requests the content of multiple files at once. Paths must be subpaths relative to the originator's sandbox. The response is delivered via the private channel.
[PRIVATE-CHANNEL] Requests to read a file from the originator's private sandbox. Response is delivered via private channel.
[INTERNAL-SANDBOXED] Requests to write a file to the originator's private sandbox.

encrypt.description: If true, the content will be encrypted at rest. Defaults to false.

listensFor.summary: [INTERNAL-SANDBOXED] Requests to delete a file from the originator's private sandbox.
[INTERNAL-SANDBOXED] Requests to recursively delete a directory from the originator's private sandbox.
[INTERNAL-SANDBOXED] Requests to open the originator's private sandbox in the OS file explorer.
[INTERNAL] Requests to open a well-known subfolder within the app's secure data zone (e.g., 'logs').
Recursively expands a directory in the tree view to a safe depth.
Recursively collapses a directory and all its children in the tree view.
Adds a new directory path to the security whitelist.
Removes a directory path from the security whitelist.
Adds a new directory path to the user's favorites.
Removes a directory path from the user's favorites.
Toggles the expanded/collapsed state of a directory in the tree view.
Toggles the selected/deselected state of a file or directory.
Initiates the process of reading selected files and copying their formatted content to the clipboard.

publishes.summary: [INTERNAL] Dispatched after a directory's children have been read from disk. Used to update the UI.
[INTERNAL] Triggers the side-effect of showing the OS file picker after the user has confirmed the 'Danger Zone' prompt.
[INTERNAL] Stores the details of a pending scoped read request while awaiting user confirmation.
[INTERNAL] Clears the pending scoped read request from the state after the workflow is complete.

private_envelopes.summary: The response envelope containing a directory listing (as subpaths), delivered to the original requester.
The response envelope containing a recursive directory listing (as subpaths), delivered to the original requester.
The response envelope containing the content of a file, delivered to the original requester.
The response envelope containing the content of multiple files, delivered to the original requester.

contents.description: A map of subpaths to their string content.

FileEntry.description: Represents a file or directory. The 'path' property MUST be a subpath relative to the originator's sandbox.
